mcrider.setting.title: Setting
mcrider.tooltip.steer_boost: Optimize the rotation of karts when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.packet_boost: Accelerate packets when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.enemy_radar: Show enemy direction arrows when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.draft_gauge: Show a draft gauge when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.auto_third_person: Automatically change to 3rd person view when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.noclip_camera: Third person camera goes through blocks when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.camera_mode: Change camera mode when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.suspension_effect: Change suspension effect when riding a kart.
mcrider.tooltip.bike_suspension: Change bike suspension effect when enable suspension effect.
mcrider.tooltip.track_minimap: Automatically search the track and display a minimap with rider positions when riding a kart.
mcrider.slider.riding_fov.tooltip: This option only works in camera mode 'default'.
mcrider.slider.riding_fov_effects.toolti: This option only works in camera mode 'default'.
